common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace task-centric fields (mainId, outId, inputIds) with a unified object-centric schema (id, cls, level, vid, pub) to align with the new OObject model.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Removed UUID/String list fields and added String id, cls, AccessLevel level, String vid, boolean pub.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Switch import from the old proto-based OaasObject to the new Java model OObject to support the refactored class structure.
Remove the constructor that mapped TaskContext to DataAccessContext, as the class no longer represents a task context.
Remove the getCls(UUID id) helper method which was specific to the old list-based input/output structure.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Deleted public String getCls(UUID id) method.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add a new 'vid' field to the data access request structure.
Update the import for the class type to reflect a package or class name change.
Change the type of the 'cls' field from OaasClass to OClass to match the renamed class.
Change the 'keys' field from a list of strings to a list of KeySpecification objects.
Rename the 'provider' field to 'defaultProvider' for clarity.
Change the parent class of OaasValidationException from NoStackException to StdOaasException to align with a new exception hierarchy.
Update the primary constructor to pass the HTTP status code directly to the new parent class constructor instead of calling a separate setter.
Replace Map<String, String> env with DSMap to use a protobuf-compatible map type.
Update ProtoField annotations to reflect new field indices and default values for serialization compatibility.
Update the ProtoFactory constructor to include new fields and the new env type.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public KnativeProvision(..., DSMap env, String apiPath)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace the old JobProvisionConfig and Type enum with new KDeploymentProvision and StaticUrlProvision fields to support a broader set of provisioning strategies.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Removed 'job' field and 'Type' enum; added 'deployment' and 'staticUrl' fields with corresponding ProtoField annotations.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Update the validation method to check for mutual exclusivity among the new set of provisioning options instead of the old job/knative pair.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Rewrote validate() to count non-null fields among knative, deployment, and staticUrl, throwing an error if more than one is present.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Switch the validation exception from the generic OaasValidationException to the more specific FunctionValidationException.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Changed import and throw statement to use FunctionValidationException.format().

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Update the ProtoFactory constructor to accept the new fields and remove the logic that derived the Type enum from the inputs.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Changed constructor signature to accept KnativeProvision, KDeploymentProvision, and StaticUrlProvision directly.
